Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

I think the issue is that AAF changes which this depends on have not been merged.  See https://jira.onap.org/browse/DMAAP-1178

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

dmaap-bc health check is not passing

Patch Set 2:

Dominic is right that we need to have updated AAF (https://jira.onap.org/browse/AAF-813)
One more thing which IMO needs to be changed - currently in values.yaml 
aafLocateUrl: https://aaf-onap-test.osaaf.org:8095/ which points to WindRiver instance, and I believe that it should point to local K8S instance
